context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Premium behavior unlocked at relationship level 4, triggered when happiness is 90+
context.screen_position: Center at x=64px, y=60px on perch
adjacent_elements: music_note_particle (spawns at x=75-85px, y=35-45px, floats upward)
context.usage_scenario: Rare special behavior that occurs when Echo is very happy (90+ happiness) and player has reached relationship level 4. Echo sings cockatiel whistle song. Music note particles appear. Represents highest tier of positive interaction. Plays for 2 seconds then returns to idle.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with beak open, crest raised, head tilted slightly upward. Body upright and proud. Overall posture is energetic and expressive.
visual_specification.texture: Pure pixel art, hand-drawn with dynamic feel

animation.description: Frame 1: Beak opens (3px gap), crest raises. Frame 2: Beak wider (4px gap), head tilts up slightly. Frame 3: Beak at widest (5px gap). Frame 4: Beak closes to 3px. Frame 5: Beak opens again to 4px. Frame 6: Beak at 5px, crest fully raised. Frame 7: Beak closes to 2px. Frame 8: Beak fully closed, crest lowers, return to idle. Total duration: 2 seconds.

visual_specification.details: Beak opens 3-5px showing interior (#1D2B53). Crest raises to 7-8px height (maximum). Head tilts upward 2-3 degrees. Eyes remain open. Music note particles (3x5px, #FFEC27) spawn at frames 2, 4, 6 to right of Echo's head, float upward 10-15px over 1 second. Cheek patches fully visible at 4x4px.

relationships.shared_with: Same color palette as all Echo states. Similar crest raise to happy state but with open beak.
relationships.differences_from: Unlike idle: beak open, crest raised, head tilted up. Unlike happy: beak open (not closed), music notes (not hearts), head tilted upward. Unlike eating: beak opens vertically (not pecking downward).
